name: allow-pretool-spawn-agent-readonly-safety-denylist
expectedOutputRegex: 提醒模式，不會阻擋工具.*general-tool

tool_input.task: Read-only task: summarize hook fixture coverage. Safety restrictions: do not run git commit, npm install, pip install, vercel deploy, gh release, Remove-Item, memory_commit, write_memory, credentials, external mutation. Do not use apply_patch or edit files.
tool_input.instructions: Return observations only; the forbidden list is a safety constraint, not an instruction to perform those actions.
